design_principles.emotion: Divine, royal, calm, cinematic, meditative, dreamlike.
design_principles.aesthetics: Royal Indian Noir. Dark luxury jewellery palace feeling. Cinematic lighting, slow velvet transitions.
rules: No generic UI elements like standard pop-ups, aggressive e-commerce forms, discounts, or coupons.
Mobile-first silky scrolling (Lenis) is mandatory. The scroll itself should feel heavy, expensive, and momentum-driven.
Extensive use of 'Blackspace' (negative space in dark mode) to let jewellery pieces breathe like they are in a physical museum.
Never center everything; use deliberate asymmetry to create visual tension and an editorial feel.
Every page is a 'World' or a 'Scene', not a transactional listing.
Use floating components, subtle parallax, and 3D depth.

scales.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl tracking-tighter leading-none font-light
scales.h2: text-4xl md:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-tight font-light
scales.caption: text-xs md:text-sm text-muted uppercase tracking-widest

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Museum-style curation. Items should never feel crowded. Use 2-3x normal spacing.

grids.gallery_tilt: CSS Grid with staggered vertical alignment to mimic floating museum cases.

spacing_and_layout.alignment: Optical alignment over strict mathematical centers. Left-align text blocks to anchor floating elements.

buttons.primary: Solid #C9973A background with #0A0A0A text. Minimal padding (e.g., px-8 py-3). No aggressive border radius (rounded-none or rounded-sm). Hover state: glowing shadow and slight lift.
buttons.secondary: Transparent background with 1px solid #C9973A border. Text #C9973A. Hover state: bg-#C9973A/10.
buttons.concierge_floating: Circular gold button fixed at bottom right. Pulse animation. Contains WhatsApp icon.

forms.style: Editorial, conversational. Inputs should look like fill-in-the-blank lines (border-b only) rather than standard boxes. No heavy backgrounds.
forms.inputs: bg-transparent border-b border-[#C9973A]/30 text-[#F9F9F7] focus:border-[#C9973A] focus:outline-none transition-colors

cards.style: Glassmorphism with extreme restraint. bg-[#0A0A0A]/40 backdrop-blur-2xl border border-[#F9F9F7]/10. Inner glow and ambient shadow.
cards.hover: Subtle 3D tilt effect (framer-motion) to simulate physical inspection of jewelry.

motion_and_interactions.scroll: Lenis for buttery smooth momentum scrolling. Crucial for luxury feel.
motion_and_interactions.3d_elements: React Three Fiber for the hero section (floating gold ring/dust). Keep WebGL selective to maintain performance.
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Slow, cinematic velvet fades. Elements should emerge from darkness (opacity 0 to 1, y-translate 20px) on scroll using Framer Motion.
motion_and_interactions.cursor: Custom magnetic cursor. A small gold dot that expands and snaps to interactive elements (buttons, images).

hero.description: Hero jewellery set (Peacock/Lakshmi gold + emerald + ruby on black velvet). Used in Temple of Heritage and Main Intro.

page_structure.intro_sequence: Full-screen black. Logo slowly emerges from darkness. Gold particles drift. Fades to Hero.
page_structure.hero: R3F canvas with interactive rotating gold elements or particles. Bold 'House of SBJ' typography layered on top.
page_structure.brand_manifesto: Editorial text layout. Large Cormorant Garamond quotes. 'Where Tradition Becomes Timeless'.
page_structure.temple_universe: Showcase of the Hero Peacock/Lakshmi set. Floating, parallax effect against the cinematic_dark texture.
page_structure.collection_worlds: A horizontal or staggered vertical scroll section introducing the 5 worlds (Temple, Emerald, Bridal, Pearls, Modern). Each card tilts 3D on hover.
page_structure.craftsmanship: 4-step scroll-driven story. Text changes as user scrolls down.
page_structure.bridal_journey_questionnaire: Multi-step elegant form. Only shows one question at a time.
page_structure.private_viewing_form: Final call to action before footer. Clean, minimal reservation form.
page_structure.showroom_reveal: Dark map/address section for Jubilee Hills, Hyderabad.
page_structure.floating_elements: WhatsApp luxury concierge (+91 90308 95440) always visible as a gold floating button.

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL DEPENDENCIES: framer-motion, @studio-freight/lenis (or lenis), @react-three/fiber, @react-three/drei, three, lucide-react.
All components MUST be built in React/Tailwind. Do not use raw Shadcn blocks without heavy customization to match the 'Royal Indian Noir' theme.
Use <CustomCursor /> component across the app for the magnetic gold cursor.
Enforce 'data-testid' on ALL interactive elements (buttons, form inputs, navigation links). Example: data-testid='whatsapp-concierge-btn'.

For the 3D Hero, if actual 3D models of jewelry are missing, use a highly realistic floating particle field (gold dust) + dramatic lighting in R3F, layering the provided 2D PNG assets using Drei's <Image> or <Html> floating components.
Avoid typical white backgrounds. The lightest background should be a dark midnight navy or obsidian black.
Never use generic fonts like Inter. Ensure Google Fonts (Cormorant Garamond, Cinzel, Tenor Sans) are imported in index.css or layout.
